meta.title: Rights Quest India | Children's Rights Learning App
meta.description: A child-friendly gamified learning platform for children's rights and legal awareness in India.
brand.name: Rights Quest India
hero.eyebrow: Children's Rights and Legal Awareness in India
hero.title: Learn your rights through stories, quizzes, videos, and rewards
hero.subtitle: Rights Quest India is a colorful educational website where students learn about children's rights, safety, education, justice, dignity, and constitutional values.
about.title: Simple legal literacy for children
about.body: Rights Quest India uses storytelling, animated cards, quizzes, coins, reward shopping, progress levels, videos, and an AI helper to make legal awareness friendly for children.
features.bright.title: Bright UI
features.bright.text: Large buttons, playful icons, and simple text.
features.stories.title: Stories
features.stories.text: Characters explain rights through real-life situations.
features.quizzes.title: Quizzes
features.quizzes.text: Level-wise quizzes unlock one after another.
features.coins.title: Coins
features.coins.text: Earn coins and buy useful student rewards.
auth.privacyNote: Prototype data is stored on this device. Production apps should use secure Firebase or MongoDB authentication.
mentor.title: Support every child's rights journey
mentor.subtitle: A warm dashboard for progress, safety guidance, rural learning support, and caring mentorship.
mentor.childSummary: 4 lessons started, 2 quizzes completed, confidence improving.
mentor.safetyText: No urgent risk signals. Encourage the child to speak openly about safe adults, body boundaries, and online safety.
mentor.guide1: Ask one calm question: What did you learn about safety today?
mentor.guide2: Praise effort before scores to build confidence.
mentor.guide3: Remind the child: unsafe secrets should be shared with a trusted adult.
mentor.ruralText: Use low-data videos, printable discussion cards, local language explanations, and weekly teacher check-ins for students with limited access.
mentor.messageText: I am proud that you are learning your rights. You can always talk to me or a trusted teacher if something feels wrong.
mentor.analyticsText: Strength: Education rights. Needs support: POCSO safety vocabulary. Recommended next: watch safety video and discuss trusted adults.
mentor.noteSent: Encouragement note saved for the child.
mentor.kitOpened: Support kit: discuss trusted adults, emergency 1098, school attendance, and safe touch rules.
auth.errors.childAgeRange: Please choose an age from 8 to 14.
auth.success.accountCreated: Account created. Please login with your email and password.
auth.audienceText: Children get a quick avatar login. Parents and teachers use a user ID and password.
auth.childHint: Use favorite name, age, and avatar
auth.childText: No password needed. Choose your favorite name, age, and avatar.
auth.adultSignupText: Create your monitoring account first. Then login with the same user ID and password.
auth.adultLoginText: Enter your registered user ID and password to open the monitoring portal.
dashboard.title: Your learning dashboard
dashboard.coinsAvailable: coins available for the reward shop
dashboard.noBadges: No badges yet. Complete a quiz to unlock one.
modules.title: Learning modules
modules.child-rights.title: Child Rights
modules.child-rights.story: Maya learns that every child deserves care, safety, learning, play, and respect.
modules.child-rights.quiz.0.question: What are child rights?
modules.child-rights.quiz.0.explain: Child rights help children grow safely, learn, and be respected.
modules.child-rights.quiz.1.question: Every child deserves dignity and care.
modules.pocso.title: POCSO Act
modules.pocso.story: A safe teacher explains that unsafe touch, threats, and unsafe secrets should be reported.
modules.pocso.quiz.0.question: If a child feels unsafe, what should they do?
modules.pocso.quiz.0.explain: A trusted adult, teacher, counselor, or helpline can help.
modules.pocso.quiz.1.question: A child's identity should be protected in sensitive cases.
modules.juvenile-justice.title: Juvenile Justice Act
modules.juvenile-justice.story: Aarav plays Judge the Case and learns that children need counselling and support.
modules.juvenile-justice.quiz.0.question: What is child-friendly justice?
modules.juvenile-justice.quiz.0.explain: Children should be heard and supported through fair processes.
modules.juvenile-justice.quiz.1.question: Children in distress may need rehabilitation.
modules.juvenile-justice.quiz.1.explain: Support helps children return to normal life.
modules.constitutional-rights.title: Constitutional Rights
modules.constitutional-rights.story: Maya unlocks school worlds while learning about education, health, equality, and dignity.
modules.constitutional-rights.quiz.0.exp: Article 21A supports free and compulsory education for children aged 6 to 14.
modules.constitutional-rights.quiz.1.que: Equality means every child deserves fair treatment.
modules.constitutional-rights.quiz.1.exp: Fairness is central to constitutional values.
quiz.label: Quiz: {{title}}
quiz.chooseFeedback: Choose an answer to get instant feedback.
quiz.completeFeedback: Quiz complete. Score: {{score}}/{{total}}. Accuracy: {{accuracy}}%. You earned {{coins}} coins.

modules.additional-legal-awareness.title: Additional Legal Awareness
modules.additional-legal-awareness.story: Children review key safety, rights, and support lessons, then practice choosing calm and legal next steps.
assistant.spotlightText: Type questions to Rights Buddy. It explains lessons, helps with quiz practice, and gives safe next steps if something feels wrong.
assistant.name: Rights Buddy
assistant.subtitle: Friendly chat helper for {{name}}
assistant.safePromise: I do not need your address, phone number, or private photos. If you are in danger, tell a trusted adult now or call Childline 1098 in India.
assistant.welcome: Hi, I am Rights Buddy. I can explain rights, help with quizzes, and guide you if something feels unsafe.
assistant.status.tap: Type a question about your rights.
assistant.status.voiceUnavailable: Voice input is not available in this browser. You can type your question instead.
assistant.status.micConnectedNoSpeech: Mic is ready. Speak again or type your question here.
assistant.status.heard: I heard you. Thinking about the safest answer.
assistant.status.voiceHeard: Voice heard. If your words did not appear, type the same question and I will answer.
assistant.status.voiceError: Mic opened, but speech was not captured clearly. Try once more, or type your question and I will answer the same way.
assistant.prompts.education: Explain Right to Education in simple words.
assistant.prompts.unsafe: I feel unsafe. What should I do?
assistant.prompts.quiz: Help me prepare for the quiz.
assistant.prompts.confused: I am confused about this lesson.
assistant.responses.unsafe: I am glad you told me. Move near a trusted adult if you can. Tell a parent, teacher, counselor, police officer, or another safe adult. In India, children can call Childline 1098 for help. You are not in trouble for asking for help.
assistant.responses.confused: That is okay. Learning rights can feel new. Try this: read one story card, watch the matching video, then answer the quiz slowly. Right now you are on {{title}}. Ask me one small question from it.
assistant.responses.quiz: For quiz levels, finish Level 1 first, then Level 2 unlocks. Read every option, remove the silly answers, and choose the safest and fairest action. Correct answers earn coins for the reward shop.
assistant.responses.education: The Right to Education means children aged 6 to 14 in India should get free and compulsory education. If a child is out of school, adults and authorities should help the child learn again.
assistant.responses.pocso: POCSO helps protect children from sexual abuse. A child can say no, leave an unsafe place, and tell a trusted adult. Unsafe secrets should not be kept.
assistant.responses.justice: Child-friendly justice means children are treated with care and fairness. A child should be heard, presumed innocent until facts are checked, and can get legal help when needed.
assistant.responses.privacy: Children have the right to be heard and treated with dignity. In sensitive legal matters, a child's identity should be protected and adults should listen respectfully.
assistant.responses.reward: You have {{coins}} coins right now. Complete quizzes carefully to earn more coins, then buy student rewards like books, a school bag, an art kit, or a cycle.
assistant.responses.progress: Your learning progress is {{progress}} percent. Complete each level quiz to unlock the next learning module. Videos stay open for everyone after login.
assistant.responses.hello: Hello. I am happy to help. You can ask about child rights, safety, quizzes, rewards, or what to do when something feels wrong.
assistant.responses.default: I can help with child rights, safety, education, POCSO, juvenile justice, quizzes, and rewards. Try asking: What should I do if I feel unsafe?
alerts.levelLocked: Complete Level {{current}} quiz first to unlock Level {{next}}.
engagement.title: Your comeback and motivation meter
engagement.quest1: Answer one easy quiz question to rebuild confidence.
engagement.quest2: Watch one short video before the next level.
engagement.quest3: Ask Rights Buddy for a hint if a topic feels hard.
engagement.bonusAlreadyClaimed: You already claimed today's comeback bonus. Try a quiz mission to earn more coins.
engagement.videoWatchedMessage: Video watched. Your quiz is unlocked for this module.
engagement.comebackClaimed: Comeback bonus claimed. You earned 15 coins and 10 points.
engagement.streakUsed: Streak freeze used. Your learning streak is protected.
engagement.noStreakFreeze: No streak freezes left right now. Complete a quiz to earn more rewards.
engagement.reason.healthy: You are doing well. Keep learning in short, happy bursts.
engagement.reason.inactivity: You may need a comeback boost. Try one tiny mission today.
engagement.reason.difficult: This topic may feel hard. Try easier mode, hints, and one small win.
engagement.reason.overload: Too much at once can feel heavy. Take one short learning burst.
engagement.reason.lowConfidence: You may need encouragement. Start with an easy-win question.
engagement.reason.confusion: You are asking for help, which is smart. Use hints and watch the matching video.
mentor.interventionText: Suggested intervention: praise effort, reduce lesson length, offer one easy-win quiz, and send a caring reminder at home.
flow.watchText: Tap the matching video card below first. Videos are always open, so you can learn anytime.
flow.quizLocked: The quiz unlocks after the module video is clicked.
flow.quizReady: Great. Your quiz is unlocked now. Go for it.
quiz.videoFirstTitle: Watch the video first, then attend the quiz
quiz.videoFirstText: The video helps you understand the story, rights, and safe legal steps before answering the questions.
quiz.videoUnlockedTitle: Great. You can now take this module quiz.
quiz.videoUnlockedText: You watched the matching video. Start the quiz when you feel ready.
quiz.watchVideoFirstAlert: Please watch this module video first. Then the quiz will unlock.
